---
title: "Packages"
format: html
tbl-colwidths: [25,10,65]
---

A list of tools and R/Bioconductor packages that I have contributed to, either as a developer/maintainer or a occasional contributor:

| Package |  | Description |
|:---------|:----|:-------------|
| [**EMMA**](https://github.com/imbeimainz/EMMA) | ![](img/EMMA-logo.png) | **E**nrichment **M**ethods **Ma**tter for enabling fully reproducible and provenance-aware pathway analysis |
| [**DeeDeeExperiment**](https://www.bioconductor.org/packages/DeeDeeExperiment) |  | An S4 class built on `SingeCellExperiment` for integrating and managing omics data analysis results |
|[**iSEEfier**](https://www.bioconductor.org/packages/iSEEfier)| ![](img/iSEEfier.png) | An R package for streamlining the creation of initial states for starting an `iSEE` instance |
|[**NeuroVar**](https://github.com/omicscodeathon/neurovar)| ![](img/neurovar-logo.png) | An open-source tool for the visualization of gene expression and variation data for biomarkers of neurological diseases |
|[**exvar**](https://github.com/omicscodeathon/exvar)| ![](img/exvar-logo.png) | An R Package for Gene Expression and Genetic Variation Data Analysis and Visualization |
|[**ROHStats**](https://github.com/NajlaAbassi/ROHStats)|  | An R package for fast and easy ROH statistics and visualization from PLINK outputs |
